title: iPadOS 26
desc: iPadOS 26 wallpaper adopts Apple's latest liquid glass design language, featuring flowing translucent layers and refined light refraction effects. Composition and colors optimized specifically for iPad's large screen perfectly showcase the visual innovation of next-generation iPadOS. This wallpaper is praised by design critics as 'a masterpiece that transforms iPad into a flowing art canvas,' embodying Apple's entirely new definition of tablet aesthetics.
